name: sensys-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM/IEEE SenSys manuscript planning, the two-deadline HotCRP review, double-blind submission, real-testbed reproducibility, ACM artifact badges, and camera-ready work at the merged sensing/embedded-AI venue.

plugins.name: sensys-skills
plugins.description: Twelve SenSys-specific skills for the sensing/embedded-AI conference: topic routing after the SenSys/IPSN/IoTDI merger, two-deadline submission strategy, real-testbed evaluation, energy and low-power measurement, artifacts, and ACM camera-ready, grounded in the SenSys 2026/2027 CFPs.
